uniqueness_rules.message: Duplicate _entity.id in this file: [{duplicate_display}]. Each entity id must appear at most once.
Duplicate _struct_asym.id in this file: [{duplicate_display}]. Each chain (asym) id must appear at most once.
Duplicate _entity_poly.entity_id in this file: [{duplicate_display}]. Each polymer entity must have at most one entity_poly row.
